name: ASUS ProArt Display PA32UCXR 32" IPS Professional Monitor - 3840x2160 - 2,304 zones Mini LED Backlight - Built-in Motorized Colorimeter - Self / Auto Calibration - Built-in 3W Speakers - USB-C Thunderbolt 4 w/ PD 90W - 2x HDMI 2.0 - DisplayPort - USB Hub
